news.title:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.
news.summary:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra's securities reaffirmed with IVR AA Stable ratings by Infomerics on 11.03.2026.
Ratings cover Basel III Tier II Bonds and AT I Bonds, totaling Rs. 3,000 crore.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra's securities reaffirmed with IVR AA Stable ratings by Infomerics on 11.03.2026.
Ratings cover Basel III Tier II Bonds and AT I Bonds, totaling Rs. 3,000 crore.

news.title:
Fitch affirms Bank of Maharashtra's IDR at 'BBB-' with Stable Outlook; upgrades Viability Rating to 'bb'.
Improved operating environment and risk profile drive BOM's financial performance; asset quality and profitability outlooks remain positive.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms Bank of Maharashtra's IDR at 'BBB-' with Stable Outlook; upgrades Viability Rating to 'bb'.
Improved operating environment and risk profile drive BOM's financial performance; asset quality and profitability outlooks remain positive.

news.title: IDBI Capital issues a Buy rating for Bank of Maharashtra at CMP ₹71.84 (24 Feb 26, 16:00).
news.summary: IDBI Capital issues a Buy rating for Bank of Maharashtra at CMP ₹71.84 (24 Feb 26, 16:00).

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra hits a 52-week high of Rs 72.3 on Feb 24, 2026.
Exceptional volume and strong accumulation make it a key mid-cap banking opportunity.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra hits a 52-week high of Rs 72.3 on Feb 24, 2026.
Exceptional volume and strong accumulation make it a key mid-cap banking opportunity.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
news.summary:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.

news.title:
RBI fined Bank of Maharashtra Rs 32.5 lakh for credit info, KYC non-compliance.
Issues found in March 31, 2025 inspection; bank improving internal controls.
news.summary:
RBI fined Bank of Maharashtra Rs 32.5 lakh for credit info, KYC non-compliance.
Issues found in March 31, 2025 inspection; bank improving internal controls.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra paid Rs.16.4 crore annual interest on BASEL III Tier II Bonds (ISIN INE457A08076) on 11.02.2026.
The bond issue size is Rs.205 crore, with a record date of 27th Jan 2026 for interest payment.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra paid Rs.16.4 crore annual interest on BASEL III Tier II Bonds (ISIN INE457A08076) on 11.02.2026.
The bond issue size is Rs.205 crore, with a record date of 27th Jan 2026 for interest payment.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra nears a 13-year breakout, forming a Cup & Handle pattern with bullish RSI and MACD signals.
FIIs & DIIs increased stakes; bank posts record profit, lower NPAs, and strong retail loan growth, with ROA & ROE above guidance.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra nears a 13-year breakout, forming a Cup & Handle pattern with bullish RSI and MACD signals.
FIIs & DIIs increased stakes; bank posts record profit, lower NPAs, and strong retail loan growth, with ROA & ROE above guidance.

news.title:
CBI court dismisses Mehul Choksi's plea against summons in Canara Bank consortium's Rs 55.3 crore loan fraud case.
CBI alleges misuse of sanctioned loans by Bezel Jewellery, causing losses to Canara Bank, Bank of Maharashtra.
news.summary:
CBI court dismisses Mehul Choksi's plea against summons in Canara Bank consortium's Rs 55.3 crore loan fraud case.
CBI alleges misuse of sanctioned loans by Bezel Jewellery, causing losses to Canara Bank, Bank of Maharashtra.

news.title:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.
news.summary:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.

news.title:
PSU bank stocks like SBI, PNB, and Bank of Maharashtra may gain focus as FM Sitharaman proposes the Banking Governance Bill in Budget 2026.
The bill aims to professionalize PSU banks, address talent gaps, and potentially raise FDI limit from 20%, signaling major banking reforms.
news.summary:
PSU bank stocks like SBI, PNB, and Bank of Maharashtra may gain focus as FM Sitharaman proposes the Banking Governance Bill in Budget 2026.
The bill aims to professionalize PSU banks, address talent gaps, and potentially raise FDI limit from 20%, signaling major banking reforms.

news.title:
PSU banks like Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, IOB, and Central Bank of India reported strong Q3FY26 results, driven by profit growth and rising net interest income.
Key highlights: IOB's net profit surged 56%, Bank of Maharashtra's by 27%, and Central Bank of India's by 31%, boosting investor sentiment.
news.summary:
PSU banks like Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, IOB, and Central Bank of India reported strong Q3FY26 results, driven by profit growth and rising net interest income.
Key highlights: IOB's net profit surged 56%, Bank of Maharashtra's by 27%, and Central Bank of India's by 31%, boosting investor sentiment.

news.title:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.
news.summary:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra informs about a proposed one-day strike on 27.01.2026 by UFBU, impacting branches.
Bank assures necessary steps for smooth functioning but highlights potential disruptions if strike occurs.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra informs about a proposed one-day strike on 27.01.2026 by UFBU, impacting branches.
Bank assures necessary steps for smooth functioning but highlights potential disruptions if strike occurs.

news.title:
Brickwork Ratings reaffirmed Bank of Maharashtra's Basel III Tier II bonds at BWR AA/Stable.
Strong business growth, stable asset quality, and 73.6% GOI stake support the rating.
news.summary:
Brickwork Ratings reaffirmed Bank of Maharashtra's Basel III Tier II bonds at BWR AA/Stable.
Strong business growth, stable asset quality, and 73.6% GOI stake support the rating.

news.title:
ICICI Pru AMC, Angel One, NLC India, Havells, and others to turn ex-dividend between Jan 20-23, 2026.
Bank of Maharashtra, NLC India, Angel One, ICICI Pru AMC, and Havells announce interim dividends; Cian Healthcare, D.B. Corp see corporate actions.
news.summary:
ICICI Pru AMC, Angel One, NLC India, Havells, and others to turn ex-dividend between Jan 20-23, 2026.
Bank of Maharashtra, NLC India, Angel One, ICICI Pru AMC, and Havells announce interim dividends; Cian Healthcare, D.B. Corp see corporate actions.

news.title: Bank of Maharashtra reports strong credit growth and asset quality in Q3.
news.summary: Bank of Maharashtra reports strong credit growth and asset quality in Q3.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra targets 14% deposit growth, NIM above 3.75%, CRAR over 16%.
Profitability metrics exceed estimates: NIM 3.87%, ROA 1.9%, ROE 23.8%, cost-to-income 37.2%.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra targets 14% deposit growth, NIM above 3.75%, CRAR over 16%.
Profitability metrics exceed estimates: NIM 3.87%, ROA 1.9%, ROE 23.8%, cost-to-income 37.2%.
